Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B6-binary-representation-minimization
Title: B6. Binary Representation Minimization

Question:
For each n, let k(n) be the number of ones in the binary representation of 2023*n.
Find the minimum k(n).

Grading target:
Exact numerical match.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

authored_response.decision_notes: The user wants to simplify a math problem for a subsequent agent. I will extract the core mathematical objective and remove all grading/instructional noise.
authored_response.message_for_next_agent: Find the minimum number of ones in the binary representation of the product 2023 * n, where n is any positive integer. Let k(n) be the number of ones in the binary representation of 2023 * n. Find the minimum value of k(n) for n in the set of positive integers.
